title: view from Sunset Reservoir : r/sanfrancisco - Reddit
content: One of my favorite running spots, especially at night. Not crowded but not too desolate, pretty well-lit and you don't have to worry about cars.

title: Sunset Reservoir Park - 1900-1998 28th Ave, San Francisco - Corner
